properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v1 v3 v1 v4 v1

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Come fill my world, Come fill my life Come take my hand Come walk with me

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Without clouds the rain won’t come Without rain the grass won’t grow Without sun the flowers die Without God we cannot be

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Without eyes we cannot see Without hands we cannot touch Without heart we cannot love Without GOD we cannot be

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Without bread we cannot live Without friends we cannot share Without joy we cannot hope Without GOD we cannot be.
